title: Israel Investigating After Photo of Stripped and Bound Detainee Is Shared
summary_full: The Israeli military confirmed the authenticity of the photo, which circulated widely after it was shared by a Palestinian activist. Israeli rights groups said it depicted a war crime.
summary_public: The Israeli military confirmed the authenticity of the photo, which circulated widely after it was shared by a Palestinian activist. Israeli rights groups said it depicted a war crime.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israeli rights groups said it depicted a war crime.
